title: ORDER BY DESC + LIMIT incorrectly yields empty result
poc: CREATE TABLE cables (id INT, created TIMESTAMP, classification VARCHAR(20));
SELECT id, classification FROM cables WHERE created BETWEEN '1990-01-17' AND '1990-01-18' ORDER BY created DESC LIMIT 20;
key_bug_features: ORDER BY DESC with LIMIT on empty result set
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE sensors (id INT PRIMARY KEY, timestamp TIMESTAMP, value FLOAT NOT NULL);
SELECT id, value FROM sensors WHERE timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 09:00:00' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 5;
SELECT id, value FROM sensors WHERE timestamp BETWEEN TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 10:10:00' AND TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 10:15:00' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 10;
